headline: House committee investigates Merck, AbbVie over China trials
summary: Five of the biggest names in American pharma just got a deadline from Washington. The House Select Committee on China sent letters this week to Merck (MRK), AbbVie (ABBV), Eli Lilly (LLY), Pfizer (PFE), and Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY), Reuters reported. Lawmakers want each company to explain ...

headline: 3 Dividend Stocks to Buy Hand Over Fist in July
summary: Dividend investors entering July 2026 have a rare setup: Three of the market’s most reliable income stocks all delivered beat-and-raise first-quarter reports, all hiked their payouts in the past 12 months and all three are riding meaningful momentum into the back half of the year. The thesis is simple. When defensive cash-flow machines start outperforming, ... 3 Dividend Stocks to Buy Hand Over Fist in July
